title: Message Group
description: Grouped sequence of message parts — text, code blocks, tool calls, and thinking indicators.
notes: Use Message Group when one assistant turn contains multiple typed parts such as text, code, tool activity, and thinking.
For grouped assistant turns, prefer the declarative MessageGroupPart[] parts array.
MessageGroupPart currently uses snake_case keys like tool_name and thinking_label.
Treat grouped parts as the settled record of an assistant turn rather than a scratch surface for every token.
Start with the /docs/messages guide if you need the conceptual model for the message stack.
